flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Oakland City University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (584 → 499).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oakland City University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oakland City University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (34.2% → 47.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Oakland City University fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.9k → $16.8k).
